description: Bill of divorce. Husband: Mevasser b. Shelomo ha-Kohen. Wife: Khulla bt. Menashshe. Location: Minyat Zifta. Dated: Sunday, 3 Elul 1417 Seleucid = 5 August 1106 CE. The document remains unfinished and unsigned, and so this divorce was not completed. On verso there is a religious poem (rahaṭ), nineteen lines, by Yeḥezqel b. ʿEli ha-Kohen. (Information from CUDL and Goitein’s index card)
description_he: מסמך משפטי מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
